assets.purpose: Homepage feature banner background: communicate ports, power, and display coverage with a premium visual on the left and text-safe space on the right.
assets.environment: Very light gray wall with a clean light wood desk surface.
assets.composition: Product story on the left half with large clean negative space on the right for white overlay text. One hero USB-C hub or dock, one compact charger, and one neat cable maximum.

productHierarchy.hero: Slim aluminum USB-C dock or hub angled on a clean desk.
supporting: One compact matte charger placed smaller and farther back.
One neatly curved USB-C cable connector.

assets.extraDirection: The theme applies a dark overlay, so keep the source image bright, calm, and high contrast enough to survive a dark gradient. No text, no clutter, no plant, no keyboard.

assets.purpose: Homepage cinematic reveal background: premium support-backed product confidence without leaving the section empty.
assets.environment: Deep charcoal studio environment with a subtle very dark gray surface, only for this explicitly dark cinematic section.
assets.composition: Large clean empty space on the left for the existing headline. Product scene on the right with one hero aluminum hub and one cable, softly rim-lit and minimal.

productHierarchy.hero: Premium satin aluminum USB-C hub placed on the right side.
supporting: One subtle cable connector near the hero object.

assets.extraDirection: Dark but not dramatic or neon. Soft controlled light, subtle reflections, realistic material, plenty of black negative space on the left. No text in the image.

assets.purpose: Homepage confidence grid featured support visual: replace placeholder/product technical collage with a clean support-context image.
assets.environment: White or very light gray background with minimal surface.
assets.composition: Compact card-friendly scene with one hero USB-C hub and one small support document/device context, no readable text and no clutter.

productHierarchy.hero: Slim aluminum USB-C hub as the main object.
supporting: One blank folded quick-start card shape or blank tablet edge used only as support context.

assets.extraDirection: No diagrams, no readable text, no labels, no fake UI. Keep it calm, bright, and suitable inside a white support card.
